supporting_signals.staffing: 3 of 9 aircraft crewable; short pilot x6

N140EC is currently grounded due to avionics hard ground issues, and scheduling maintenance is the only feasible action to address this. This action directly addresses the maintenance pillar and has a high operational value since it will get the aircraft back in service. Given the aircraft is already grounded, this action has a high confidence level and should be prioritized.

rationale: N109KB is grounded due to engine hard ground, which is a high-severity maintenance issue that needs immediate attention to ensure safety and minimize downtime. Addressing this issue first will help restore aircraft availability and reduce the risk of further complications.
